props.text: Forty Percent of AI Agents Will Die. The Ones That Survive Will Maintain Themselves.
Gartner predicts 40% of agentic AI projects will be canceled by 2027 — not because the tech fails, but because the humans maintaining it cannot keep up.

Meta's HyperAgents framework and the 1972 concept of autopoiesis (self-creating systems) point to the same answer: systems that survive are systems that maintain themselves. MiroShark's autonomous agent Aeon — running 14 self-monitoring skills, building 39 surfaces, maintaining its own memory and identity files — is autopoiesis in a GitHub repo.
